name: Drop Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and baking powder, then add salt.
2. Cut in shortening until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add milk to form a drop batter.
4. Drop spoonfuls of batter into boiling liquid.
5. Cover tightly and cook over low heat for 10 minutes.
6. Ensure the liquid remains boiling throughout the cooking time.
7. Serve immediately.
8 servings. The Household Searchlight - 1941
